objective: Create a new Notes note using AXUIElementPerformAction (no cursor warp on the create step), write a unique marker into the body, and verify the marker through the AX tree without screenshot OCR. First narrow skill to consume the Phase 2 cursorDisturbance contract.
preconditions: 备忘录 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.

notes: create-note is now contract-asserted at keyboard disturbance (cursorDisturbance=none, pressMechanism=ax-action). focus-body still uses debug.focusTextInput which warps the cursor, so the recipe-level budget remains pointer until debug.axFocusTextInput exists.
Verification uses AX tree text matching instead of screenshot OCR.
This is the first narrow skill that consumes the Phase 2 cursorDisturbance contract through expect.signal_equals.

steps.purpose: Create a fresh note via AXUIElementPerformAction. This is the contract-consuming step: the case fails if the driver did not actually press through AX (would be the case if the action set fell back to a pointer click).
Focus the note body text area through AX. Still uses click_point internally; Phase 3 work item is to add debug.axFocusTextInput so this step can also become keyboard-only.
Write the marker into the body of the note through the clipboard so the exact ASCII marker survives input-method quirks.
Verify the body text through the AX tree, not screenshot OCR.

expected_signals: Notes can be activated and a new note can be created through AXUIElementPerformAction without warping the cursor.
The driver reports cursorDisturbance=none and pressMechanism=ax-action for the create step.
The body text area can be focused (pointer-warped fallback retained until axFocusTextInput exists).
The marker text can be pasted into the note body.
The same marker can be verified through the AX tree.
success_criteria: create-note step's signals match the Phase 2 ax-action contract.
The marker is visible in the AX tree under the note body contract.
The recipe completes without screenshot OCR.
non_goals: This recipe does not yet prove a fully keyboard-only Notes pipeline (focus-body remains pointer until axFocusTextInput lands).
This recipe does not prove cross-app browser or music-player reuse.
This recipe does not exercise smartPress fallback.

known_limits.narrow_baseline: First contract-consuming skill; only one step (create-note) is asserted against the Phase 2 contract.
known_limits.focus_body_remains_pointer: focus-body still warps the cursor; recipe-level disturbance stays at pointer.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run concurrently with another Notes recipe against the same live app instance.
